prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small brown rubber sphere
  - obj_1: small brown metal cube
  - obj_2: large gray metal sphere
  - obj_3: small yellow rubber sphere
  - obj_4: small cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_5: small purple metal cylinder
  - obj_6: small cyan rubber cube
  - obj_7: large green rubber cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0181] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0182] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0183] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0186] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0187] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0188] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0189] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0190] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0191] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0192] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0193] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0194] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0195] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0196] Compare the distance between obj_3 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0197] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0198] Compare the distance between obj_4 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects across multiple views to estimate distances.

Let me identify the objects from the images:
- obj_0: small brown rubber sphere
- obj_1: small brown metal cube
- obj_2: large gray metal sphere
- obj_3: small yellow rubber sphere
- obj_4: small cyan rubber sphere
- obj_5: small purple metal cylinder
- obj_6: small cyan rubber cube

- obj_1 (brown cube): back-left area
- obj_6 (cyan cube): front-center-left
- obj_2 (gray sphere): center
- obj_0 (brown sphere): center-front
- obj_7 (green cylinder): front-right
- obj_3 (yellow sphere): back-right
- obj_4 (cyan sphere): back-right (behind obj_3)
- obj_5 (purple cylinder): back-right

Estimating distances:
- obj_2 to obj_7: ~medium distance
- obj_3 to obj_4: ~small distance (close together in back)
- obj_3 to obj_6: ~medium distance

- obj_5 to obj_6: ~medium distance
- obj_5 to obj_7: ~medium distance
- obj_6 to obj_7: ~medium distance
- obj_3 to obj_5: ~small distance
- obj_4 to obj_7: ~large distance
- obj_4 to obj_5: ~small-medium distance
- obj_3 to obj_7: ~large distance
